name: llm-routing
description: Multi-model routing: Orchestrator (qwen2.5:3b) routes to Worker (qwen2.5:7b), Reasoner (deepseek-r1:7b), or Escalate (Claude). Key files: orchestratorModel.ts, queryModelRouter.ts, modelPool.ts. Enable via LOCAL_FIRST=true and USE_LLM_ORCHESTRATOR=true. Tool calling requires Ollama models with tool template in Modelfile.

content: Canopy prompt tool names must match runtime tool names exactly: WebSearch (not WebSearchTool), Read (not FileReadTool/ReadTool), Edit (not FileEditTool), Write (not FileWriteTool), Bash (not BashTool), Glob (not ListFilesTool/GlobTool), Grep (not GrepTool). Source: .canopy/prompts.jsonl local-system entry. Cache: .claude/.local-prompt-cache

title: Remove coordinator training from v7
rationale: When LOCAL_FIRST=true, toolPool.ts bypasses applyCoordinatorToolFilter() so the local model gets all 30 tools directly. Coordinator delegation training (Agent+TaskStop only) contradicts this runtime behavior and confuses the model.

name: v7-training-pipeline
description: Fine-tuning pipeline: (1) generate_v6_training.py → train.jsonl (2) finetune_tool_calling.py with --gpu 0 --epochs 3 --batch-size 2 --lora-r 16 (3) convert_to_gguf.sh merged/ → GGUF (4) ollama create with Modelfile. Venv: docker_scripts/ollama/.venv (has unsloth+torch). Output: claude-explorer-model/v7/{lora_adapter,merged}. GPU0 (RTX 3090) preferred.
